None of the existing claims are about the database. They are about TypeScript, dev server port, client name, project name, and scope contact.
Therefore, the new claim is unrelated to all of them. They can all be true at the same time.

"uses TypeScript throughout" - could Postgres contradict this? No, Postgres is a database, TypeScript is a language.
"runs on port 3000" - no.
"client is Halcyon Freight" - no.
"named Meridian" - no.
"handled through Sarah Vance" - no.

All are unrelated.
